rules.name: BP_AutoFill_Address
rules.description: When changing vendor (business partner), auto-fill delivery address, invoice address, payment terms, payment method, and purchase price list from vendor defaults

rules.name: Line_Recalc_Totals
rules.description: After saving a line, recalculate header totals (TotalLines, GrandTotal)

rules.name: Product_AutoFill_Price
rules.description: When selecting a product, auto-fill unit price from purchase price list, tax category, and UOM from product master

rules.name: Line_Calc_NetAmount
rules.description: Recalculate line net amount when quantity, price, or discount changes

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when order status is Completed or Voided

rules.name: PriceList_Filter_Purchase
rules.description: Filter price list selector to show only purchase price lists (M_PriceList.IsSOPriceList='N')

rules.name: BP_Filter_Vendor
rules.description: Filter business partner selector to show only vendors (C_BPartner.IsVendor='Y')
